James H. Honacki, Kenneth E. Kinman & James W. Koeppl
treatments.journalTitle: Mammal Species of the World (1 st Edition)

response.answer:
The provided documents do not contain specific information on the roosting habits of Laephotis botswanae. However, according to Document 3 (Order Chiroptera), the type locality for Laephotis botswanae is Botswana, specifically 50 mi. (80 km) W. and 12 mi. (19 km) S. Shakawe.

It can be inferred that this location might serve as a potential roosting site for the species, but no further information on its roosting habits or preferences is provided in the documents.
